## Description | 描述

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if any).

请包含更改的摘要和相关的 issue（如果有）。

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change | 更改类型

Please check the relevant option:

请勾选相关选项：

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) | Bug 修复
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) | 新功能
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) | 破坏性更改
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update | 文档更新
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting | 代码风格/格式化
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes) | 重构
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement | 性能改进
- [ ] ✅ Test update | 测试更新

## Algorithm & Language | 算法与语言

Which algorithm(s) and language(s) are affected?

哪些算法和语言受影响？

- [ ] Huffman
- [ ] Arithmetic
- [ ] Range coder
- [ ] RLE
- [ ] Other / N/A

Languages | 语言:
- [ ] C++
- [ ] Go
- [ ] Rust
- [ ] Python (scripts)
- [ ] Other / N/A

## Checklist | 检查清单

Please ensure all items are checked before submitting:

提交前请确保所有项目都已勾选：

### Code Quality | 代码质量

- [ ] My code compiles without errors | 我的代码编译无错误
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code | 我已对代码进行自我审查
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines | 我的代码遵循项目的风格指南
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas | 我已对代码进行注释，特别是难以理解的部分

### Testing | 测试

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally | 我已在本地测试我的更改
- [ ] Existing tests pass with my changes | 现有测试在我的更改下通过
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works | 我已添加测试证明我的修复有效或功能正常
- [ ] Encode/decode round-trip test passes | 编码/解码往返测试通过

### Documentation | 文档

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly | 我已相应更新文档
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md (if applicable) | 我已更新 CHANGELOG.md（如适用）

### Cross-Language Compatibility | 跨语言兼容性

If your change affects the file format:

如果你的更改影响文件格式：

- [ ] Files encoded by my implementation can be decoded by other language implementations | 我的实现编码的文件可以被其他语言实现解码
- [ ] N/A - My change does not affect the file format | 不适用 - 我的更改不影响文件格式

## Screenshots / Output | 截图/输出

If applicable, add screenshots or command output to help explain your changes.

如果适用，添加截图或命令输出来帮助解释你的更改。

```
# Paste output here | 在此粘贴输出
```

## Additional Notes | 附加说明

Add any other information about the PR here.

在此添加有关 PR 的任何其他信息。
